benefits.description: Dramatically improved ADHD symptoms, worked better than any other ADHD medication tried

side_effects.description: Tachycardia - pulse increased from baseline 80-90 bpm to 100-130 bpm

protocol_notes: Brand name Rybelsus (oral semaglutide). Also taking Atomoxetine 20mg. User has family history of atrial fibrillation. GLP-1 confirmed as cause of tachycardia after stopping Atomoxetine and retesting. User notes dopamine-increasing drugs worsen ADHD; seeks norepinephrine-increasing alternatives. Carbohydrate consumption worsens ADHD, suggesting neuroinflammation component.
